commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `matrix-js-sdk` and `@matrix-org/matrix-sdk-crypto-wasm` to root `package.json` dependencies so packaged Matrix runtime imports can resolve after install.

PR surface: Config +2. Total +2 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source and package metadata: Matrix requires these packages, current root package/shrinkwrap metadata omits them, and the PR body provides registry/install commands showing the released omission. I did not run a live patched package install in this read-only review.
